completed_steps.summary: Initialized state file for Deep Scan. Migrated project_knowledge from docs/ (marketing) to _bmad-output/project-docs/.
Classified as multi-part repository with 3 parts: backend (backend), frontend (web), extension (extension). User confirmed.
Existing docs inventoried: CLAUDE.md (compact project guide), _bmad-output/project-context.md (202 agent rules across 7 categories), README.md, docs/ (marketing landing — not engineering docs).
Tech stack per part verified from pyproject.toml / package.json. Captured exhaustively in project-context.md Category 1; not re-documented here.

Scoped to Phase 4 modules only: backend/src/auth/, repos/, audit/, settings/, webhooks/. Read models.py, constants.py, dependencies.py, router.py, schemas.py, middleware.py for all five modules. Endpoint inventory extracted via grep.
Source tree analysis produced (scoped to Phase 4 surface area in backend/src/).
Supporting docs written: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, backend-auth-deep-dive.md, data-models-backend.md, api-contracts-auth.md.

skipped_steps.reason: Dev/deployment info already in CLAUDE.md + Makefile; low marginal value.
Integration architecture across parts covered in CLAUDE.md + project-context.md Category 3.
Full per-part architecture docs out of scope for Phase-4 PRD grounding.
No incomplete-doc markers used; nothing to complete.
Final validation folded into writing step.

resume_instructions: Scan complete. For full 12-step coverage, run bmad-document-project again in a fresh context with mode=full_rescan.
